projectDescription: A browser extension that lets you customize your browser's theme color using an interactive color wheel, with support for day/night modes and saved color palettes.
keyFeatures: Interactive color wheel for real-time browser theme customization
Day and night mode toggle with persistent storage
Save and reapply custom color palettes
Live reload development workflow with webpack
Color theory utilities including hex-to-CMYK conversion
publicApiSurface: setTheme(theme, value, mode) - Apply a color to the browser theme
updateColor(theme, value, mode) - Update color for current mode
changeMode(theme, mode) - Switch between day and night modes
storage.sync / storage.local - Browser extension storage abstraction
onRequest(msg, sender) - Content script message listener (CHANGE_COLOR)
